scripts.render:example: pnpm build && node dist/src/cli.js render fixtures/evaluation-tree.example.json --out .ai-native-eval/artifacts/example-report/report.html
scripts.render-folder:example: pnpm build && node dist/src/cli.js render-folder fixtures/folder-run.valid --out .ai-native-eval/artifacts/folder-report/report.html --skills-dir ../../../
scripts.validate-folder:example: pnpm build && node dist/src/cli.js validate-folder fixtures/folder-run.valid --skills-dir ../../../
scripts.persist:example: pnpm build && node dist/src/cli.js persist fixtures/evaluation-tree.example.json --changed-file README.md --changed-file docs/blueprint.md
scripts.score:example: pnpm build && node dist/src/cli.js score fixtures/evaluation-tree.example.json
